leadText: Salad Mix (Japanese: やさいパック Vegetable Pack) is a type of ingredient introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] It can be used as an ingredient in making curry .

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V One of the many ingredients that can be used for cooking at your camp. The assortment of vegetables looks quite appealing and healthy.

sections.title: In the core series games

The assortment of vegetables looks quite appealing and healthy.
